title: USD-base FX sizing bug: weights_to_target_qty divides by JPY price -> USDJPY ~160x under-sized, sub-min-lot, never fills, phantom in positions.json
source: LIVE R-phase 2026-06-23: CEO observed the survival-book dashboard showed USDJPY target weight 13.3% / position 841.58 / P&L '—', yet MT5 shows NO open USDJPY position. Root-caused with quant-phd-advisor (agent a9eecd7dfcec70d06).
why: execution/reconcile.py:41 converts target weight->qty as qty_i = (weight_i*equity)/price_i. That is correct ONLY when the QUOTE currency == account currency (USD): for XXXUSD (EURUSD/GBPUSD/XAUUSD) qty*price = USD notional. For USD-BASE pairs (USDJPY, USDCAD, USDCHF) the quote is the foreign ccy, so qty*price is a notional in JPY/CAD/CHF, not USD. Concretely USDJPY: 0.1333*1,019,660/160.3 = 841.6 base units = 0.0084 lots = ~$842 real USD notional, vs the intended ~$135,800 (13.3%). Under-sized by ~160x (the FX rate). 0.0084 lots < broker volume_min 0.01 -> order is sub-minimum and NEVER fills (fills.jsonl has 0 USDJPY fills; MT5 empty). The bug SELF-CONCEALS: the risk diagnostic uses the reciprocal convention notional = qty*price, so it reports 841.58*160.3 ~= $134.9k ~= the INTENDED notional -> the dashboard shows a healthy 13.3% leg with -0.117 variance share while the broker holds nothing. The SAME wrong convention (base_units*price) is in execution/discipline_guard.py:122 (the four section13 metrics), the gross-notional/headroom diagnostics, and pipeline/survival_book variance shares -> any fix MUST be applied consistently via a single usd_notional() map or fixing the sizer alone would make the guard value a corrected USDJPY at ~$13.6M and trip the leverage/margin caps.
value_rationale: Restores the designed 5-leg inverse-vol risk parity. Today the only counter-directional (long-USD, -0.117 var share) hedge leg is silently absent, so the book runs ~10-15% OVER its 3% vol target and MORE net-directional than the model believes (effective_bets=2.86 is overstated; the 4 real legs EUR/GBP/XAU/XAG long are one risk-on factor). Fixing it pulls realized vol back to target and reinstates true diversification -> cleaner survival curve (helps Best Sharpe). NOTE: it does NOT help the section13 net_directional ding (guard measures signed-INSTRUMENT notional; a restored USDJPY 'buy' keeps net=1.0).
scope: TDD: failing test pinning the correct weight->qty for USD-quote (XXXUSD), USD-base (USDXXX), and CROSS (EURGBP/EURCHF) pairs. Correct map: usd_value_per_base_unit u = price for XXXUSD, u = 1 for USDXXX, u = base-ccy USD spot for crosses; qty = w*equity/u. Prefer deriving u from broker SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE*contract_size (account-ccy, handles crosses+metals).

Introduce ONE shared usd_notional()/usd_value_per_unit() helper and route reconcile.py (sizer), discipline_guard.py (the four section13 metrics + headroom scaling), the gross-notional/headroom diagnostics, and survival_book variance_shares through it so sizer and risk model agree. Otherwise fixing the sizer alone trips the caps.
Compute live risk diagnostics (gross leverage, variance_shares) from BROKER-TRUTH positions run through the same map, not from target weights (the target-vs-fills gap is what hid this).

Reconciliation hygiene: positions.json is documented (state.py:10) as the local TARGET store, not held-state; downstream display presents it as held. Ensure no live logic (equity-lock flatten, PnL attribution) acts on an unfillable phantom target; surface held-vs-target distinctly.
Full suite green; risk-officer review before any LIVE deploy (restart) given it changes sizing of a live book mid-competition.
recommendation: PhD-advisor (memo, agent a9eecd7dfcec70d06): the formula fix is the correct END-STATE; only the TIMING is the CEO's call. The corrected leg is RISK-REDUCING (restores the hedge, vol->target) and carries ZERO section14/margin danger (margin usage 1.2%, margin_level 8385%), so the usual 'don't add risk in-flight' objection is inverted. Cleanest sequence: fix + re-enter the full 5-leg book at the next REBALANCE boundary (not an ad-hoc intraday slam); if a round-end snapshot is imminent, run 4 legs to the snapshot and fix immediately after. Do the broker-truth reconciliation of diagnostics regardless (pure correctness, no exposure change). Caveat surfaced by CEO/PM: restoring a long-USD hedge dampens our beta to crypto/risk-on, which has been LIFTING our rank (see memory live_metric_flat_favoring_r1) -- a barbell-vs-survival tension worth weighing, though lower vol is the survival book's mandate.
out_of_scope: No change to the inverse-vol/vol-target math itself, the Stage-2 sleeve, or barbell isolation. No live restart/deploy without explicit CEO timing decision + risk-officer sign-off. This entry is diagnosis + TDD prep; deploy is gated.

history.reason: live-observed USDJPY phantom; root-caused USD-base notional convention bug with quant-phd-advisor

Faithful sim (book's own functions, 30y D1 cov; data through Jun-10 so k=0.40 vs live 0.493 — but vol-ratio/eff-bets/var-shares are k-invariant). ACTUAL 4-leg book (USDJPY phantom) vs corrected 5-leg: (1) ex-ante vol 3.33% = 1.11x the 3% target (USDJPY var-share -0.075 hedge removed). (2) effective bets COLLAPSE 2.61 -> 1.42 — the held book is ~half as diversified as the model believes. (3) risk is 61% metals (XAU 0.27 + XAG 0.34 var-share); net USD-FX exposure -0.248 vs intended -0.143 (=+73% more net-short-USD/risk-on). (4) USDJPY is the ONLY negative-corr leg (-0.65/-0.62 vs EUR/GBP, -0.25/-0.27 vs metals). (5) corrected USDJPY ~$107-136k notional, +$3.5-4.5k margin on 1.2% base -> ZERO section14/margin risk. Regime (through Jun-10): metals selloff (XAG -14%, XAU -6.5% / 10 bars), USD firming -> the missing hedge would have cushioned. Live comp marks: EUR -486 GBP +277 XAG -160 XAU +105, no USDJPY. CONCLUSION: scenario B (current, accidental) is the only indefensible posture; A (fix to 5-leg designed) or C (conscious 4-leg de-scope re-targeted, gross 0.256) are both legitimate. Fix is risk-reducing + diversification-restoring; crypto-beta concern DORMANT (crypto flat until Stage-2 PCE).
CEO chose scenario A (fix to 5-leg designed book): implement cross-module USD-notional fix with TDD + risk-officer, gated on CEO restart signal (no live deploy without explicit go).

Implemented (scenario A) + reviewed. Central helper execution.symbol_specs.usd_value_per_unit (u=price for XXXUSD/metals/crypto UNCHANGED, u=1.0 for USDXXX, u=base-ccy USD spot for crosses, ValueError if unresolvable) routed through reconcile.weights_to_target_qty, discipline_guard (metrics+held gross), both brokers' order_notional, 3 live_loop survival-rebalance sites (headroom/cur_w/target-gross-gate), AND osr_live.py:316 (latent site the risk-officer flagged — now closed, OSR not deployed). TDD: prior xfail flipped to passing; new tests in test_symbol_specs/test_discipline_guard/test_notional_leverage_gate; B0090 oracle corrected. RISK-OFFICER (agent ad2e1deaab3ddc242) verdict = PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT. Confirmed: first-post-restart = ONE USDJPY buy ~1.35 lots (~$135k, +$4.5k margin on 1.2% base) -> ZERO section14/margin-call risk; gross gate identical budget pre/post (no lever-up path), only scales DOWN; idempotent (min_trade floor 1000 base units > residual -> no churn); XXXUSD/crypto/metals byte-identical; crypto-flat/sleeve/stage2_lambda=0 undisturbed; section13 net_directional stays 1.0 (PRE-EXISTING accepted ding, not worsened). MUST-FIX-BEFORE-DEPLOY (restart hygiene, gated to CEO): restart ONLY via persisted launch_cmd.json (--crypto-var-cap 0.0 --portfolio-kill 0.015) with watchdog intentional-stop handling (B0214 re-buy precedent); pick a QUIET window away from Jun-24 22:00 R1 snapshot; verify service up + reconcile-to-broker-truth + portfolio-kill live; record the restart+timing in history at the moment of deploy. DEPLOY NOT DONE — running service still holds old code.

DEPLOY EXECUTED 2026-06-23 ~02:21 UTC (03:21 BST), CEO-authorized gated restart. Stopped service (PID 43600/14452) via survival_stop.bat (intentional-stop flag set), relaunched with the EXACT launch_cmd.json argv (--crypto-var-cap 0.0 --enable-control-plane --portfolio-kill 0.015) so ONLY the code changed, not config (control-plane retained vs survival_run_flat.bat which would have dropped it). New PID 26264/44700 running the B0215-fixed code (commit 0f40645). VERIFIED: launch_cmd re-persisted identical; fast risk loop active (heartbeat 60s, portfolio-kill 0.015 + DD breaker enforced -> capital managed); dd_latched=false; crypto FLAT (sleeve envelope 0, lottery armed=false, stage2_lambda=0); equity_lock off; watchdog monitor not running (no auto-restart race). NUANCE: the corrective USDJPY buy is BAR-TRIGGERED, not startup-triggered. BarCloseScheduler fires run_cycle only when latest_closed_bar() > last_bar_cursor (=2026-06-22 00:00, already processed by the old service at 00:00:52 UTC today). So the 5-leg correction (USDJPY ~1.0-1.35 lots) will fire at the NEXT D1 close (~2026-06-24 00:00 UTC), NOT immediately. Until then the book runs the 4-leg (slightly hot, no-hedge) config. This natural bar-boundary timing is consistent with the risk-officer 'quiet window' caveat and the per-round Sharpe/DD reset. CEO to decide: accept natural deferral vs force an immediate rebalance (controlled stop -> one-shot run_cycle -> restart loop).

CEO chose (b) FORCE the correction now. Executed stop-loop -> one-shot run_cycle (no --loop, places orders unconditionally) -> relaunch loop. One-shot placed the corrective trade: buy USDJPY 1.3591 lots, notional $135,908 (~0.133x equity), PARTIAL fill 135000 base units (residual ~908 < min_trade floor 1000 -> idempotent, no churn). FIX CONFIRMED WORKING LIVE: gross order notional $135,908 NOT ~$21M (USDJPY measured in true USD); target-book leverage 0.493x < 0.5 cap, leverage_scale=0.493 capped=False (NO spurious scale-down); ONLY 1 order (the 4 XXXUSD legs idempotent -> their sizing byte-unchanged, regression-clean). positions.json now 5 legs (EUR/GBP/USDJPY/XAU/XAG); broker truth holds USDJPY 135000. Loop relaunched (PID 25684/45548) with exact argv (control-plane retained), re-persisted launch_cmd, heartbeat tick=0 pos=5 latched=False -> managed + idempotent (no double-trade). Crypto FLAT, stage2_lambda 0, equity_lock off preserved. The designed 5-leg survival book (effective bets 2.86, vol ~3% target, USDJPY hedge restored) is now LIVE. REMAINING: full suite was green pre-deploy; branch fix/b0215-usd-base-fx-sizing commit 0f40645 NOT pushed (awaiting CEO OK). Move B0215 to done once the first natural D1-close cycle confirms idempotency.

COMPLETE. USD-base FX notional fix implemented (central usd_value_per_unit routed through reconcile/discipline_guard/both brokers/3 live_loop survival sites/osr_live), TDD green (full suite 3018 pass, prior xfail flipped), risk-officer PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, deployed via CEO-authorized gated restart + forced corrective rebalance (USDJPY 1.35 lots/$135k, USD-correct notional, gross 0.493<0.5 no-scale, margin_level 6117% -> zero S14). 5-leg designed book LIVE (PID 25684/45548); watchdog re-armed (PID 26480/41140, HIGH, auto-restart via launch_cmd.json). IDEMPOTENCY VERIFIED LIVE: post-correction the loop holds 5 legs with NO further orders (fills end at the USDJPY buy; sub-min residual ~908 < min_trade floor 1000). The next natural D1 close (~2026-06-24 00:00 UTC) is expected to be a clean no-op reconcile; the watchdog will surface any anomaly. Branch fix/b0215-usd-base-fx-sizing pushed (0d53623/0f40645/307e4d3).
